$comment: Declarative record of the Hermes scheduled jobs. The launchd plists in scripts/launchd/ are generated from this and registered on the local machine (local-first, per ADR-006..009). Re-load after editing: scripts/launchd/install.sh

jobs.label: com.systemix.hermes.daily
jobs.does: Synthesize all contracts with status: evidence-ready into hermes-synthesis HITL cards (.systemix/queue.json). No-ops when none are ready.

jobs.label: com.systemix.hermes.weekly
jobs.does: Synthesize project goals + contract state into ONE architecture-proposal HITL card for human review in /queue (the weekly architecture gate).
